route.description: Exposure route evaluated by the router.

scenario_class.description: Scenario class evaluated by the router.

worker_detected.description: Whether worker context was explicitly detected.
worker_detected.title: Worker Detected

detection_basis.description: Fields or tags that triggered worker-context detection.
detection_basis.title: Detection Basis

support_status.description: Current implementation status for the task path.

recommended_model_family.description: Best-fit model family for the task given the current MCP boundary.
recommended_model_family.title: Recommended Model Family

recommended_tool.description: Current MCP tool to call next when one is available.
recommended_tool.title: Recommended Tool

target_mcp.description: MCP or adapter boundary that should own the next step.
target_mcp.title: Target Mcp

guidance_resource.description: Documentation resource that explains the routed worker path.
guidance_resource.title: Guidance Resource

required_inputs.description: Inputs that should be provided before taking the routed path seriously.
required_inputs.title: Required Inputs

warnings.description: Worker-routing warnings that should remain visible.
warnings.title: Warnings

limitations.description: Known limits of the routed worker path.
limitations.title: Limitations

rationale.description: Why the router chose this path.
rationale.title: Rationale

next_step.description: Recommended immediate action for the caller.
next_step.title: Next Step
